message:
feat(polyfills): add zlib raw DEFLATE, buffer bounds, fs.cp recursive, stream abort

Phase 13 polyfill improvements:
- zlib: deflateRawSync/inflateRawSync now use correct raw DEFLATE functions
- zlib: brotli functions throw proper errors instead of silent pass-through
- buffer: add bounds checking to all numeric read/write methods
- fs: copyFileSync supports COPYFILE_EXCL flag
- fs: fs.promises.cp() supports recursive directory copying
- os: networkInterfaces() and cpus() wired to native implementations
- stream: pipeline() and finished() support AbortSignal option
